static const char *
rx_register_name (struct gdbarch *gdbarch, int regnr)
{
  static const char *const reg_names[] = {
    "r0",
    "r1",
    "r2",
    "r3",
    "r4",
    "r5",
    "r6",
    "r7",
    "r8",
    "r9",
    "r10",
    "r11",
    "r12",
    "r13",
    "r14",
    "r15",
    "usp",
    "isp",
    "psw",
    "pc",
    "intb",
    "bpsw",
    "bpc",
    "fintv",
    "fpsw",
    "acc"
  };

  return reg_names[regnr];
}
